title: Mayor Walsh Announces Final Stage of West Genesee Street Project
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh announced the final stage of the West Genesee Street 'Dig Once' infrastructure project, with repaving beginning October 9 on a 2.3-mile stretch from South Salina to Myrtle Street. The project coordinates utility replacements (water, sewer, telecom, gas) to minimize future excavations, with paving operations expected to complete by end of November while keeping the road open to traffic.
